kernel_group: sdpa_prelude (Q/K/V projection + per-head RMSNorm + RoPE + GQA expansion + causal mask)
note: Standalone microbench of the full SDPA prelude as inductor emits it for prefill_512_b1: 3x cuBLAS mm (Q/K/V projections) + per_..._1 (Q per-head RMSNorm + RoPE) + per_..._2 (K per-head RMSNorm + RoPE) + 2x where_3 (KV GQA-expansion 8 -> 16 heads) + where_4 (causal+padding mask). Source: extract/microbench_inductor.json (key 'sdpa_prelude_us'). The harness uses this as the codegen-vs-codegen speedup baseline.
headline_kernel: triton_poi_fused..._where_3 -- 24.99% of prefill_512_b1 walltime (across all call sites)
hardware: NVIDIA GB10 Blackwell (sm_121), 48 SMs, unified LPDDR5X
